APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF VIA COURTCALL. JOSHUA FURMAN, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANTS VIA COURTCALL. AFTER ARGUMENT, THE COURT FINDS GOOD CAUSE PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1332(C)(7) AND CRC 3.1332(D)(10). THE COURT GRANTS DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL. THE TRIAL DATE OF 10/5/20 IS CONTINUED TO 1/4/21 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. DISCOVERY AND OTHER PRETRIAL DEADLINES EXCEPT FOR EXPERT DISCLOSURES PER CCP 2034.210 ET SEQ. ARE CLOSED. THE NEW TRIAL DATE OF 1/4/21 WILL GOVERN ALL MATTERS RELATED TO THE EXCHANGE OF EXPERT WITNESS INFORMATION UNDER CCP 2034.210 ET SEQ. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
